text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru and I have come<n>to a local
shrine, but before I can do<n>any sort of praying...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: So, are you ready?! Don't hold back...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Cleanse me of all evil spirits, I beg<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, I haven't been feeling too great<n>lately. Then
yesterday, the great<n>Shiraoki appeared before me
and<n>said...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Have your destined partner cleanse<n>you of evil
spirits. Only then will you<n>be able to take the next
step.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So please, I'm begging you! My<n>oh-so-divine
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! I knew I could rely on you!<n>They don't call
you "Trusty Trainer"<n>for nothing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Now, repeat after me! Ready, and...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Squishy toe beans! Meow!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh my... Whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Guess who's been reborn! Me! ☆

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: See! My aura's completely different,<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What a relief! No more days cowering<n>in the face
of bad luck! And not only<n>that...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Pfft, hahaha! That meow just now<n>was priceless!
Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: That was so funny, I could listen to<n>that forev—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Uh... hehe...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You wouldn't happen to be<n>hungry, would
you?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Cleansing evil spirits really works up<n>your
appetite! Why don't we head<n>back and grab
something to eat?!<n>Yeah, let's do that!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I have mixed feelings about this, but<n>at least
Matikanefukukitaru has her<n>energy back.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Meow? Mew mew...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Meow?! Meooow?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru is desperately<n>trying to
communicate with her eyes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Meow! Meow meow! (I think I've<n>been
possessed by a cat!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Meow, meow meow meow! (It's<n>probably angry
about the cleansing<n>ritual... Now it's gone and
taken<n>charge of my body!)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
From the looks of it, she's angered<n>an evil spirit
enough for it to reveal<n>itself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Meowwwww! (Nooo! What do I<n>dooo?!)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I pull out all the stops to calm her<n>down. She's
soon back to speaking<n>normally, but nothing can
fix her<n>mood.
